name: Developer Change Lifecycle Reference Cluster
description: Explicitly routes a software-change task to one owning judgment asset and at most two distinct advisors, from authority and planning through evidence, completion, and production readiness.

domains.load_condition: Authorize, authorized, authorizes, allowed, authority, consent, permission, requested scope, send, publish, delete, external side effect, inferred intent, 授权、同意、权限、范围、发送、发布、删除、外部副作用、推断意图。
Plan, decompose, sequence, dependency, parallel work, milestones, recovery plan, 规划、拆解、顺序、依赖、并行、里程碑。
Done, complete, fixed, ready, handoff, acceptance evidence, unresolved risk, 完成、修复、就绪、交付、验收证据、残余风险。
Deploy, production release, rollout, canary, monitoring, on-call response, rollback, 部署、生产发布、灰度、监控、值班响应、回滚。
Shared contract, schema, persistent data, permission, migration, blast radius, recovery cost, behavioral uncertainty, 共享契约、数据、权限、迁移、爆炸半径、恢复成本、行为不确定性。
domains.contribution_hypothesis_template: For {task}, identify causal reach, asymmetric state changes, recovery cost, and verification gaps that the owning primary does not itself adjudicate.

domains.load_condition: Test, verification, regression, unit, integration, contract test, end-to-end, coverage, 测试、验证、回归、单元、集成、契约测试、端到端、覆盖率。
domains.contribution_hypothesis_template: For {task}, choose the smallest failure-sensitive evidence portfolio and state residual uncertainty beyond the primary's decision frame.

relationships.description: Planning may not expand beyond granted authority.
Risk identifies which uncertainties and irreversible gates should be front-loaded.
Test judgment defines which evidence is actually defect-sensitive.
Deployment controls may lower exposure but cannot erase asymmetric change risk.
Release readiness needs targeted evidence for credible production failure modes.
